creator: doug@plutotech.com
text:
I configured the AirSpace UI with one Record Monitor,
	one Play widget, and one Record widget.  I recorded
	a one-minute EventId called "doug".  I stopped the 
	Record after approximately 10 seconds.  I repeatedly
	hit the Start and Stop buttons, and at the end I re-queued
	to the beginning.  After a few cycles, BSC2 abnormally
	terminated.

How-To-Repeat: 
	See "Description".
